title: callicarpa denticulata
intro: Callicarpa denticulata, also known as the toothbrush callicarpa or purple fruit callicarpa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa denticulata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
